title: stenogyne mollis
intro: Stenogyne mollis, also known as Hawaiian Mountain Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The medicinal properties of Stenogyne mollis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving headaches and digestive issues, and even acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the respiratory system. Stenogyne mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or combining them with other herbs and oils to create topical applications.
